title: Section 114
content: 1[114. Components of property tax.Save as otherwise provided in this Act, the property taxes shall be levied on lands and buildings in Delhi and shall consist of the following, namely:-- (a) a building tax, and (b) a vacant land tax.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Delhi Act 6 of 2003, s. 5, for section 114 (w.e.f. 1-8-2003).
